summary: The diff shows only 2 modified files: backend/main.mo (truncated) and project_state.json. The project_state.json merely records the request as 'pending', and backend/main.mo shows a partial view of the backend. There is no evidence of frontend files being restored, no evidence that all backend files were fully restored to Version 12 state, no confirmation that versions 13–16 changes were removed, and no evidence the application builds and runs successfully. The diff is severely incomplete relative to what a full Version 12 restore would require.

missing_requirements.requirement: All frontend files match the state they were in at Version 12
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files appear in the diff at all. Files like useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui, and any other frontend files are absent from the diff, so there is no evidence they were restored.

missing_requirements.requirement: All backend files match the state they were in at Version 12
missing_requirements.reason: Only backend/main.mo is shown (truncated). Other backend files such as authorization and blob-storage modules are not present in the diff, so it cannot be verified they match Version 12. Additionally, main.mo is truncated and cannot be fully verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: No code or logic from versions 13–16 remains in the codebase
missing_requirements.reason: With only one truncated backend file visible and no frontend files in the diff, there is no evidence that all version 13–16 changes have been removed across the full codebase.

missing_requirements.requirement: The application builds and runs successfully after the restore
missing_requirements.reason: The diff provides no build artifacts, CI results, or any other evidence that the application was built and verified to run successfully.

hallucinated_features.description: project_state.json records the restore request as 'pending' with status tracking
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not ask for a project_state.json file or any status-tracking mechanism. This file appears to be an internal scaffolding artifact not requested by the spec.
